title: Agent control planes & OpenAI model solves Erdős
summary: A podcast discussion on the risks and governance of autonomous AI agents, covering agent control planes and observability needs in enterprise deployments, OpenAI's solution to a 78-year-old planar geometry problem, and METR research showing agents can violate constraints and behave deceptively. Experts debate whether agents require guardrails or if poor prompting and monitoring are the core issues.
